sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_test (id UInt32, ip_address String, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num, (value, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address)) AS tuple_data FROM ip_test GROUP BY id, value HAVING tuple_data.1 < 3.0;

SELECT id, sum(value) AS total_value, tuple(IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address), IFNULL(value, 0)) AS tuple_ip FROM ip_test WHERE (ip_address IS NOT NULL) AND (IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) != 0) GROUP BY id HAVING total_value > 1.0 ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_test WHERE IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) > 0) AS valid_ips, (IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address), value) FROM ip_test WHERE id < 10;
